question: How fast will I see ROAS improve?
answer: Typically week 4–6 for paid search, week 6–10 for paid social. Faster if attribution is clean. Slower if your tracking pixels are broken which we'll find out in week 1.

question: What's the minimum monthly ad spend you'll work with?
answer: ₹5L/month for a single channel. ₹15L/month for multi-channel. Below that, you're better off with an in-house generalist than an agency.

question: Do I keep ownership of my ad accounts?
answer: Always. We work as users on your accounts, never as owners. If we part ways, you lose nothing—not a pixel, not historical data, not an audience list.

question: How is this different from my current agency?
answer: Three differences: (1) you talk to a senior every other week, not an account manager every Friday; (2) you get a live dashboard, not a deck; (3) we publish a written KPI commitment in month 1.

question: Do you do white-label work for other agencies?
answer: Yes. About 15% of our book. Reach out to whitelabel@tangence.com for details.

question: How fast can we start?
answer: Audit within 5 business days of the call. First test campaign live within 14 days. Full rebuild typically inside 30 days.

question: Is Tangence a Google AdWords agency?
answer: Yes. Google rebranded AdWords to Google Ads in 2018, but the platform and expertise are the same. Our Head of Search has managed Google Ads campaigns for 12 years.
